Well - Timed Watermelon Grape Wine With Natural Flavor A Memphis Original As a native Memphian , I've always dreamed of creating a wine that speaks to both heritage and innovation . That dream became reality with Taylor Made Wine , a collection crafted for those eager to discover and develop a refined palate . Each bottle balances the artistry of fruitiness , acidity and sweetness , celebrating the elements that define the soul of wine . Taylor Made Wine is not just about sipping , it's about engaging all your senses : the vibrant colors that catch your eye , the aromas that awaken memory , and the flavors that linger on your tongue . Our wines invite you to grasp timeless concept like structure and balance while uncovering the unique character and personality that make each pour distinct . This is more than a drink , it's a journey to elevate your wine experience with sophistication and delight . When you " Taste The Wine , " you're not just drinking , you're immersing yourself in the art and ritual of wine tasting , taking measured sips that guide your palate toward perfection . Taylor Made Wine is crafted to be experienced , savored , and remembered . A SHARED HERITAGE OF THE WILD WEST Rooted in California's coastal ranching traditions , damons , T.W. Hollister & Co. and Alisal Ranch have teamed up to craft small - batch aperitifs that honor the land and its legacy . Infused with sustainably foraged hummingbird sage and wildflower honey , this limited - edition vermouth captures the spirit of a rugged yet pristine landscape where timeless beauty meets quiet strength . A tribute to a way of life shaped by oak - dotted hills , native botanicals , and the enduring rhythms of the wild , this vermouth is our love letter to the land its character , its heritage , its soul . With every pour , we hope to bring the outside into your glass , instilling a sense of place and carrying the ranch's story forward , one sip at a time . Try it on its own , or enjoy in your favorite cocktail .
